## Maintenance

- First over-the-air release via the new in-app updater — if you're on v0.6.4+, this should arrive as an "Update & restart" banner (no manual download). No functional changes; this verifies the auto-update path end to end.

## macOS — how to open

This build is **ad-hoc signed** (not yet notarized with an Apple Developer ID). If you're installing manually, on first open macOS shows a security prompt:

- **Right-click (or Control-click) the app → Open → Open**, or
- **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (after the first blocked attempt).

If a download still shows "damaged", clear the quarantine once:

```
xattr -cr /Applications/Parley.app
```

(In-app updates download in the background and shouldn't trip this prompt.)
